rule: Mac executes nothing on schedule; every line writes a receipt; founder approvals are structural API gates, not conventions

lines.name: Platform Health Line
lines.failure_behavior: 1 fail warn; 2 consecutive -> telegram alert + github issue; never auto-rollback; keep probing

lines.name: Candidate Intake Line
lines.output_artifact: scored candidate rows; high-score telegram notify
lines.failure_behavior: validation 422 normal; scoring exceptions file repair candidates; intake never blocked

lines.name: Team Bench Sourcing Line
lines.failure_behavior: unverifiable candidates dropped; zero-row run files finding; never fabricate

lines.name: Agentic Evaluation Line
lines.schedule: nightly 09:00 UTC + on status change to founder_review
lines.output_artifact: risk flags, fit deltas, founder-review question packs, rank ordering
lines.failure_behavior: LLM failure degrades to deterministic-only output tagged PARTIAL

lines.name: Prompt Registry Line
lines.schedule: on registry PR; on every prompt run
lines.output_artifact: versioned prompts with contracts; prompt_runs log
lines.receipt: prompt_runs rows + CI receipt on version activation
lines.failure_behavior: contract-test failure blocks new version only; previous version keeps running (rollback rule)
founder_approval_points: activating versions that touch candidates or spend money (cost_class dollars)

lines.name: Deploy Truth Line
lines.schedule: on push to main; daily 12:00 UTC
lines.input_source: git main + live build markers + package verifier
lines.failure_behavior: drift -> alert + HOLD flag row blocking L3/L4 autoruns until founder resolves

lines.name: Asset Gate Line
lines.schedule: inside every L1 run + weekly deep audit Sun 10:00 UTC
lines.input_source: ASSET_GATES map (8 assets) + NDA-gated team bench materials
lines.output_artifact: gate audit matrix; anomalous access flags
lines.failure_behavior: any leak = SEV-1 alert + immediate founder notify; probing continues

lines.name: Founder Approval Queue
lines.schedule: on approval-state entry; daily digest 15:00 UTC
lines.input_source: bench contact requests, founder_review candidates, drift holds, prompt activations, spend unlocks, offer/trial stages
lines.output_artifact: single ordered decision queue with approve/reject/defer mapped to gated API actions
lines.failure_behavior: never auto-approves; stale items age visibly in digest
founder_approval_points: this line IS the founder surface
